description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 13 mins of coding time in WakaTime, with a daily average of 3 hrs 5 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, and the most-used languages were TypeScript, Other, Java, Markdown, and JSON. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded during this period.
